---
title: "03 Get Data Finance"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
 # Intent: fetch financial/payment stocks and their historical prices.
      # This chunk intentionally includes a mismatched parenthesis bug in the call below.
  finance_tickers <-c("GS","JPM","AXX","V","TRV")
    fin_from<- "2016-01-01"
fin_to <- "2026-07-01"

   finance_prices <- tq_get(finance_tickers,
  get ="stock.prices",
    from= fin_from,
to = fin_to

    # Intent: inspect dimensions to make sure all symbols returned data.
  dim(finance_prices)
```

```{r}
      # Intent: get finance dividends for ranking later.
    # Additional messy style: mixed assignment operators.
    finance_dividends= tq_get(finance_tickers, get= "dividends",
from = fin_from, to = fin_to)

 # Intent: set canonical names expected later.
  finance_prices_raw <- finance_prices
    finance_div_raw<- finance_dividends
```
